src: Set up your own IPsec VPN server in just a few minutes, with IPsec/L2TP, Cisco IPsec and IKEv2. Supports Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS/RHEL, Amazon Linux, Alpine and Raspberry Pi. Includes client config and management scripts.
ja: IPsec/L2TP、Cisco IPsec、IKEv2 対応の IPsec VPN サーバーを数分でセットアップ。Ubuntu、Debian、CentOS/RHEL、Amazon Linux、Alpine、Raspberry Pi をサポート。クライアント設定・管理スクリプト付き。
